description: Add `rm -f "${WORKSPACE}/.git/index.lock"` immediately before the `git checkout -B "$PHASE_BRANCH"` call in scripts/phase-commit.sh (Step 4), without any `[[ -f ]]` guard, to close the TOCTOU race window described in Incident 8. The investigation document already describes this exact change and falsely claims it has been applied, but the script currently has no index.lock cleanup before checkout at all.
title: Apply unconditional index.lock removal to phase-commit.sh
